summary: Phase 1 Cross-Module Automations Testing Complete. All 4 automation flows tested and verified: (1) Quote signed → auto draft invoice, (2) Invoice paid → auto OHADA journal entry, (3) Contract signed → auto draft payslip, (4) New employee → auto draft CDI contract. All automations are idempotent - no duplicates on repeat triggers. Toast notification system implemented with ToastHost component and useAutomationNotifications hook.

minor.issue: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'toLocaleString') at line 567 when sending signed document email. Non-blocking - invoice update succeeds.
Returns 409 Conflict for certified invoices (expected behavior - DGID fiscal lock). Test cleanup cannot delete certified invoices.

action_items: Fix email sending error in invoices.ts line 567 - toLocaleString called on undefined value (likely inv.totalHT or inv.tvaTotal)
Update test_smartdesk_api.py to use cookie-based auth instead of Bearer tokens (existing tests fail due to auth migration)
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 automation functions in /app/server/services/automations.ts are well-structured with proper idempotency checks
autoCreateFirstPayslip: checks payslips (employeeId, month, year) uniqueness
Toast system properly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing
WebSocket broadcasts fire correctly for all automation events
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_AUTO_ prefix and cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 automations fully tested. All 4 cross-module automations working with idempotency. Cookie-based auth is in use (no Bearer tokens). Certified invoices cannot be deleted (DGID fiscal lock). Toast notifications implemented but not visually tested due to WebSocket timing - toasts appear briefly when automations fire.

automation_tests: test_create_employee_auto_contract - PASSED: POST /api/employees returns autoContractId, contract created with correct type/status/salary
test_employee_auto_contract_idempotency - PASSED: Duplicate employee POST does not create second contract
test_contract_signed_auto_payslip - PASSED: PUT /api/employees/contracts/:id (status→Signed) returns autoPayslipId, payslip created with Congo CNSS/IRPP deductions
test_contract_signed_payslip_idempotency - PASSED: Signing twice for same month returns null autoPayslipId
test_invoice_paid_auto_journal - PASSED: PUT /api/invoices/:id (status→Paid) creates journal entry with OHADA accounts (521/701/445)
test_invoice_paid_journal_idempotency - PASSED: Marking same invoice Paid twice does not create duplicate journal entry
test_quote_signed_internal_auto_invoice - PASSED: PUT /api/invoices/:id (Quote, status→Signed) creates draft invoice, quote status→Converted
frontend_tests: Login flow - PASSED: admin@smartdesk.cg / admin logs in successfully
Dashboard - PASSED: Shows stats cards, sales chart, French UI
Navigation - PASSED: Sidebar links to all modules visible

quote_to_invoice.internal_PUT: WORKING - Quote status Draft→Signed creates draft Invoice, Quote status→Converted

invoice_to_journal.status_change: WORKING - Invoice status→Paid creates OHADA journal entry (521 debit, 701/445 credit)

contract_to_payslip.internal_PUT: WORKING - Contract status→Signed/Active creates draft payslip for current month
contract_to_payslip.congo_deductions: WORKING - CNSS 4% + IRPP 2025 brackets applied for Congo companies

employee_to_contract.auto_create: WORKING - POST /api/employees returns autoContractId with CDI type
employee_to_contract.idempotency: WORKING - employeeId existence check prevents duplicates
